---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? What use case does it address?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature and how it should work.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've thought of and why you prefer your proposal.

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or examples that would help.
